title: narcissus lacildulensis
intro: Narcissus lacildulensis, also known as the false narcissus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and linear leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Narcissus lacildulensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
